title: Baked Norwegian Cod with Delicate Cream Sauce
description: A simple and flavorful recipe featuring tender Norwegian cod baked to perfection with a rich and creamy sauce.
instructions: Season the cod fillets with salt and pepper.
Place the cod fillets on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Dot the top of each cod fillet with unsalted butter.
Bake in the preheated oven for 8-10 minutes or until cooked through.
While the cod is baking, melt the unsalted butter in a saucepan over medium heat.
Add the delicate cream and bring to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let the sauce simmer for 2-3 minutes or until slightly thickened.
Stir in the chopped fresh parsley.
Serve the baked cod with the delicate cream sauce spooned over the top.
